commands.name: ping
commands.description: Verify bridge connectivity.
commands.result: Plugin identity and current server status.

commands.name: list_commands
commands.description: List supported bridge commands.
commands.result: Command name list from the contract.

commands.name: editor_state
commands.description: Read the current Godot editor scene state.
commands.result: Edited scene path/root name and play-state.

commands.name: open_scene
commands.description: Open a scene in the running editor.

args.name: path
args.description: Scene path as res://... or project-relative.

commands.name: play
commands.description: Play the configured main scene.

commands.name: stop
commands.description: Stop the currently running scene.

commands.name: save_scene
commands.description: Save the edited scene, optionally to an explicit path.

commands.name: select_node
commands.description: Select a node in the edited scene.

args.name: path
args.description: Node path relative to the edited root or absolute.

commands.name: add_node
commands.description: Instantiate and add a node under a parent node.
commands.result: Created node path, name, and type.

args.name: type
args.description: Godot class name. Defaults to Node.

args.name: properties
args.description: Optional property dictionary to apply after creation.

commands.name: set_property
commands.description: Set a property on a resolved node.
commands.result: Echo of updated path, property, and value.

commands.name: set_main_screen
commands.description: Switch the Godot editor main screen.

args.name: screen
args.description: Main screen name such as 2D, 3D, Script, or AssetLib.

commands.name: call
commands.description: Call a public method on an allowed bridge target.

args.name: target
args.description: One of the allowed call targets.

args.name: method
args.description: Public method name. Methods starting with '_' are rejected.

commands.name: pipeline_overview
commands.description: Read high-level pipeline storage and count state.

commands.name: list_workflow_templates
commands.description: List workflow template summaries.

commands.name: get_workflow_template
commands.description: Fetch a full workflow template document.

commands.name: upsert_workflow_template
commands.description: Create or update a workflow template.

args.name: template
args.description: Template object to normalize and persist.

commands.name: delete_workflow_template
commands.description: Delete a workflow template when it is not in use.

commands.name: list_workflow_runs
commands.description: List persisted workflow run summaries.

commands.name: get_workflow_run
commands.description: Fetch the source-of-truth workflow run document.
commands.result: Workflow run payload with attempts, artifacts, revisions, logs, and validation.

commands.name: create_workflow_run
commands.description: Create a new workflow run from a template.

args.name: asset_slug
args.description: Stable slug for generated asset output.

commands.name: delete_workflow_run
commands.description: Delete a workflow run and its scratch artifacts.

commands.name: apply_workflow_decision
commands.description: Advance or resolve a workflow attempt with an explicit decision.

args.name: decision
args.description: Allowed decision name from the attempt.

commands.name: set_workflow_import_recipe
commands.description: Persist import settings for a workflow run.

commands.name: set_workflow_attempt_job
commands.description: Record the outbound provider request for a workflow attempt.
commands.result: Updated workflow run and attempt payload.

args.name: job_id
args.description: Optional provider job id if already known.

args.name: note
args.description: Optional note attached to the attempt.

commands.name: set_workflow_attempt_job_status
commands.description: Record provider status, outputs, and errors for a workflow attempt.
commands.result: Updated workflow run and attempt payload.

args.name: status
args.description: Job status mapped into pipeline state.

args.name: downloaded_paths
args.description: Optional local res:// or file paths for downloaded outputs.

commands.name: register_workflow_artifact
commands.description: Create or update a workflow artifact record.
commands.result: Updated workflow run and artifact payload.

args.name: attempt_id
args.description: Optional attempt id that produced the artifact.

args.name: preview_uri
args.description: Optional preview image path or URI.

args.name: selected
args.description: Whether the artifact is selected as canonical.

args.name: publish_candidate
args.description: Whether the artifact is eligible for publish.

args.name: artifact_id
args.description: Existing artifact id to update in place.

commands.name: delete_workflow_artifact
commands.description: Delete an artifact from a workflow run.
commands.result: Updated workflow run and deleted artifact id.

commands.name: publish_workflow_revision
commands.description: Publish the canonical revision manifest for a run.
commands.result: Updated workflow run and revision manifest payload.

commands.name: set_workflow_artifact_selected
commands.description: Mark an artifact as selected or unselected.
commands.result: Updated workflow run and artifact payload.

commands.name: set_workflow_artifact_publish_candidate
commands.description: Mark an artifact as a publish candidate or clear that flag.
commands.result: Updated workflow run and artifact payload.

notes: The bridge tracks editor and pipeline state; it does not execute third-party generation jobs directly.
Use set_workflow_attempt_job before provider execution and set_workflow_attempt_job_status after polling or completion so external work remains auditable in the workflow run.
Published manifests include the run's current import_recipe and the currently selected canonical artifacts.
